description_long: This is a small, lifelike bird with a compact body and a short, conical beak. Its plumage is primarily a muted brownish-gray, with subtle gradients and slightly lighter underparts. The wings are neatly folded against its sides, showing layered feathers with a smooth, matte finish. The tail is short and appears slightly squared at the tip, with feathers that are closely packed. The legs and feet are slender and pale, extending just beyond the tail. The overall appearance suggests a common urban passerine, blending well with natural and built environments.
description: A small, brownish-gray bird with a short, conical beak and smooth, layered feathers. Its compact body and subtle plumage make it well-suited for urban settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's compact body, folded wings, and short beak.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the layered tail feathers and the alignment of the wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with the beak and body profile visible.
description_view_3: Front view showing the rounded head, short beak, and symmetrical wing placement.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid with subtle gradients and slight mottling on wings and back
